name: Angelica Liqueur 2 (Drambuie)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the chopped angelica to the Scotch and let steep overnight.
2. Strain the mixture, then add the honey.
3. Allow the liqueur to sit undisturbed for two months until cloudiness settles.
4. Siphon off a sparkling clear liqueur with golden color.
5. If desired, use the liqueur immediately, including any cloudiness.
